text:
also known as a preferred mail order pharmacy 
within a split network) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_MOPP_COINS_3M 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
— 

COMMENT: 
This variable was new in 2007. Plans that use a co-payment amount rather than a coinsurance 
percentage will not have a value in this field; see instead the corresponding co-payment variable 
called (PRE_ICL_MOPP_COPAY_3M).
